description_long: This is a modern athletic sneaker featuring a sleek, streamlined silhouette with a predominantly blue and black color scheme. The upper is constructed from synthetic materials, with layered panels and reinforced sections for durability and support. Black laces are threaded through multiple eyelets, and the shoe includes distinctive neon green pull tabs at both the tongue and heel for easy on and off. The midsole is thick and contoured, providing cushioning and a sporty aesthetic, while the outsole appears to be made of durable rubber. The interior is padded, likely with foam, for comfort during extended wear. The overall design is contemporary and suitable for urban environments, blending style and functionality.
description: A stylish blue and black athletic sneaker with neon green pull tabs, layered synthetic panels, and a thick cushioned sole. The design is modern and built for comfort and durability.
description_view_0: Side view showing the layered blue and black panels, black laces, and neon green pull tab on the tongue.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the rounded toe, black laces, and the central neon green pull tab.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same layered construction and the heel pull tab.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the heel structure, neon green pull tab, and the contoured sole.
